tasks.subject: [mesh-panel-consolidation] [P1] Update mesh barrel exports
tasks.description:
## Goal

Export `TopologyPanel`, `AgentHealthDetail`, and `MeshEmptyState` from the mesh feature barrel so they can be consumed by the agents-list feature and AgentsPage widget.

## File: `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/index.ts`

The current barrel exports only `MeshPanel`, `DiscoveryView`, and `ScanRootInput`:

```typescript
/**
 * Mesh feature — agent discovery, registry, and observability UI.
 *
 * Internal components (TopologyGraph, AgentNode, MeshStatsHeader, AgentHealthDetail,
 * CandidateCard, AgentCard, RegisterAgentDialog, BindingDialog, AdapterNode, BindingEdge,
 * etc.) are encapsulated within the feature and accessed only via MeshPanel.
 *
 * @module features/mesh
 */
export { MeshPanel } from './ui/MeshPanel';
export { DiscoveryView } from './ui/DiscoveryView';
export { ScanRootInput } from '@/layers/entities/discovery';
```

Add the three new exports and update the module doc to reflect the new public surface:

```typescript
/**
 * Mesh feature — agent discovery, registry, and observability UI.
 *
 * Exports topology and health components for composition on the Agents page,
 * plus discovery components. Internal components (TopologyGraph, AgentNode,
 * CandidateCard, AgentCard, RegisterAgentDialog, BindingDialog, AdapterNode,
 * BindingEdge, etc.) remain encapsulated.
 *
 * @module features/mesh
 */
export { MeshPanel } from './ui/MeshPanel';
export { DiscoveryView } from './ui/DiscoveryView';
export { TopologyPanel } from './ui/TopologyPanel';
export { AgentHealthDetail } from './ui/AgentHealthDetail';
export { MeshEmptyState } from './ui/MeshEmptyState';
export { ScanRootInput } from '@/layers/entities/discovery';
```

Note: `MeshPanel` stays exported for now (Phase 3 task 3.3 removes it).

## Acceptance Criteria

- `TopologyPanel` is importable from `@/layers/features/mesh`
- `AgentHealthDetail` is importable from `@/layers/features/mesh`
- `MeshEmptyState` is importable from `@/layers/features/mesh`
- Existing imports of `MeshPanel`, `DiscoveryView`, `ScanRootInput` continue to work

[mesh-panel-consolidation] [P3] Remove dialog registration and delete MeshDialogWrapper, MeshPanel, MeshStatsHeader
tasks.description:
## Goal

Remove the mesh dialog entry from the dialog contributions registry and delete the dialog wrapper, MeshPanel component, and MeshStatsHeader.

## File 1: `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/app-layout/model/dialog-contributions.ts`

Remove the mesh entry from the `DIALOG_CONTRIBUTIONS` array and the `MeshDialogWrapper` import.

Current file has 7 entries. Remove the mesh entry (lines 39-45) and the import (line 6):

```typescript
// DELETE import:
import { MeshDialogWrapper } from './wrappers/MeshDialogWrapper';

// DELETE array entry:
{
  id: 'mesh',
  component: MeshDialogWrapper,
  openStateKey: 'meshOpen',
  priority: 5,
  urlParam: 'mesh',
},
```

The resulting file will have 6 dialog contributions: settings, directory-picker, tasks, relay, agent, server-restart-overlay.

## File 2 (Delete): `apps/client/src/layers/widgets/app-layout/model/wrappers/MeshDialogWrapper.tsx`

Delete this file entirely. It is a thin wrapper (35 lines) that renders `MeshPanel` inside `ResponsiveDialog` chrome. No other file imports it except `dialog-contributions.ts` (which we just updated).

## File 3 (Delete): `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/ui/MeshPanel.tsx`

Delete this file entirely (226 lines). All unique functionality has been extracted:
- `DeniedTab` -> `DeniedView` (task 1.3)
- Topology + AgentHealthDetail split-pane -> `AgentsPage` (task 1.7)
- `TopologyPanel` (Access tab) -> `AccessView` (task 1.4)
- DiscoveryView is imported directly by other consumers

## File 4 (Delete): `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/ui/MeshStatsHeader.tsx`

Delete this file entirely (38 lines). The MeshStatsHeader was only used inside MeshPanel. The Agents page does not need it because the filter bar and status column in AgentsList provide equivalent information.

## Acceptance Criteria

- `dialog-contributions.ts` has 6 entries (no mesh)
- `MeshDialogWrapper.tsx` is deleted
- `MeshPanel.tsx` is deleted
- `MeshStatsHeader.tsx` is deleted
- No TypeScript errors from dangling imports (verify all consumers have been updated in prior tasks)
tasks.activeForm: Removing dialog registration and deleting dialog/panel files

[mesh-panel-consolidation] [P3] Update mesh barrel and delete MeshPanel test
tasks.description:
## Goal

Remove the `MeshPanel` export from the mesh barrel and delete the MeshPanel test file.

## File 1: `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/index.ts`

After task 1.2 added the new exports, the barrel looks like:

```typescript
export { MeshPanel } from './ui/MeshPanel';
export { DiscoveryView } from './ui/DiscoveryView';
export { TopologyPanel } from './ui/TopologyPanel';
export { AgentHealthDetail } from './ui/AgentHealthDetail';
export { MeshEmptyState } from './ui/MeshEmptyState';
export { ScanRootInput } from '@/layers/entities/discovery';
```

Remove the `MeshPanel` export (the file was deleted in task 3.1). Update the module doc:

```typescript
/**
 * Mesh feature — agent discovery, registry, and observability UI.
 *
 * Exports topology, health, and empty state components for composition
 * on the Agents page, plus discovery components. Internal components
 * (TopologyGraph, AgentNode, CandidateCard, AgentCard, RegisterAgentDialog,
 * BindingDialog, AdapterNode, BindingEdge, etc.) remain encapsulated.
 *
 * @module features/mesh
 */
export { DiscoveryView } from './ui/DiscoveryView';
export { TopologyPanel } from './ui/TopologyPanel';
export { AgentHealthDetail } from './ui/AgentHealthDetail';
export { MeshEmptyState } from './ui/MeshEmptyState';
export { ScanRootInput } from '@/layers/entities/discovery';
```

## File 2 (Delete): `apps/client/src/layers/features/mesh/__tests__/MeshPanel.test.tsx`

Delete this file entirely (283 lines). The coverage it provided is replaced by:
- DeniedView tests (task 1.3)
- AccessView tests (task 1.4)
- AgentsPage tests (task 1.8)
- TopologyGraph tests remain (TopologyGraph is not deleted)

## Acceptance Criteria

- `MeshPanel` is no longer exported from `@/layers/features/mesh`
- `MeshPanel.test.tsx` is deleted
- Remaining mesh barrel exports (`DiscoveryView`, `TopologyPanel`, `AgentHealthDetail`, `MeshEmptyState`, `ScanRootInput`) still work
- No other file in the codebase imports `MeshPanel` (verify with grep)
tasks.activeForm: Updating mesh barrel and deleting MeshPanel test

tasks.subject: [mesh-panel-consolidation] [P3] Update AGENTS.md documentation
tasks.description:
## Goal

Update the AGENTS.md architecture documentation to reflect that MeshPanel dialog no longer exists and all mesh/agent management is at `/agents`.

## File: `AGENTS.md`

The file contains a reference to the `/agents` route at line 144:

```
- `/agents` → `AgentsPage` (widgets/agents) — fleet management surface. Mode A (no agents): full-bleed `DiscoveryView`. Mode B (agents present): tabbed `AgentsList` + lazy `TopologyGraph`. With `DashboardSidebar` (shared nav, Agents item active) and `AgentsHeader` (Scan for Agents button)
```

Update this line to reflect the 4-view structure:

```
- `/agents` → `AgentsPage` (widgets/agents) — fleet management surface with 4 views: List (sortable DataTable), Topology (React Flow graph with AgentHealthDetail split-pane), Denied (blocked paths), Access (namespace ACL rules). Mode A (no agents, list/topology only): `AgentGhostRows` with discovery CTA. Mode B: full view rendering. With `DashboardSidebar` (shared nav, Agents item active) and `AgentsHeader` (4-tab switcher + Scan for Agents button)
```

Also at line 143, there's a reference to MeshPanel within the dashboard description:

```
- `/` → `DashboardPage` (widgets/dashboard) — mission control with three sections in priority order: `NeedsAttentionSection` (conditional, zero DOM when empty), `SystemStatusRow` (Tasks/Relay/Mesh health cards + sparkline), `RecentActivityFeed`
```

The Mesh health card in SystemStatusRow now navigates to `/agents?view=topology` instead of opening a dialog. The description mentions "Tasks/Relay/Mesh health cards" which is still accurate (the card still exists, it just navigates differently). No change needed there.

## Acceptance Criteria

- `/agents` route description updated to mention 4 views
- No references to MeshPanel dialog remain in AGENTS.md
- Description accurately reflects the current architecture
